desired_capability: Create a prompt-only local Codex skill that turns vague product pain into an executable local AI workflow plan by grilling for real need, separating assumptions from confirmed requirements, and producing an implementation plan with acceptance criteria.
target_user: local Codex user building AI workflow tools
triggers: When a product idea starts vague and needs structured requirements before implementation.
When the user expects the AI to infer missing needs but confirm risky assumptions.
non_triggers: When the task is already specified as a small code edit.
When private project internals are required to solve the task.
must: Grill for real user pain and missing requirements.
Separate confirmed facts from inferred assumptions.
Produce a concrete build plan and acceptance criteria.
Write all generated files under package/.
must_not: Do not include project-private facts, raw conversation text, provider payloads, credentials, or secrets.
